hero.headline: Your Hudson Valley Landscape Done Right
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Red Cedar Landscapes has transformed properties across the Hudson Valley with expert design, natural stonework, and full-service care. From intimate garden retreats to large-scale commercial grounds, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy your outdoor space.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Landscape Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Property
services.subtitle: From design concept to finished installation, Red Cedar handles every phase in-house. No subcontractors, no surprises — just 40 years of craftsmanship backing every project.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom landscape architecture and installation including plantings, garden design, and full property transformations tailored to the Hudson Valley environment.

cards.title: Natural Stonework & Hardscaping
cards.description: Expert construction of boulder walls, bluestone walkways, patios, retaining walls, and masonry features that blend naturally with your landscape.

cards.title: Excavation & Site Work
cards.description: Complete excavation services including land clearing, demolition, grading, foundation work, storm drainage, and septic system installation.

cards.title: Tree Services & Arboriculture
cards.description: Professional tree removal, stump grinding, plant healthcare, pest management, and disease control performed by ISA Certified Arborists.

cards.title: Commercial Landscape Management
cards.description: Comprehensive property maintenance programs including seasonal plantings, lawn care, irrigation systems, and snow management for commercial clients.

cards.title: Landscape Supply Yard & Nursery
cards.description: On-site supply yard offering mulch, topsoil, stone, plants, and trees available for delivery or pickup throughout the Hudson Valley region.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule Your Site Visit
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. We'll visit your site, assess the terrain, and provide a detailed plan with honest pricing — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our certified professionals handle everything from landscape design to excavation, stonework, and plantings. One team, one point of contact, from start to finish.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Property
steps.description: Step outside to a landscape that's been crafted with 40 years of expertise. We offer ongoing maintenance to keep your property looking its best year-round.

about.label: Why Hudson Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Four Decades of Craftsmanship, One Family's Commitment
about.description: Founded in 1985 by Steven Relyea, Red Cedar Landscapes has grown from a small local operation into the Hudson Valley's most trusted full-service landscape company. With ISA Certified Arborists on staff, an A+ BBB rating, and a deep commitment to environmental stewardship, we bring integrity and expertise to every project — from backyard gardens to municipal properties across five counties.

features.title: Certified & Safety-Trained Crews
features.description: Every crew member is trained to CTSP safety standards, and our arborists hold ISA certification. Your property and family are in expert hands.

features.title: Full In-House Operation
features.description: Design, excavation, stonework, planting, and supply yard — all under one roof. No subcontractors means seamless quality from concept to completion.

features.title: Environmental Stewardship
features.description: We design landscapes that work with nature, not against it. Sustainable practices, native plantings, and responsible land management are at our core.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Honest Estimates.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed written proposals so you know exactly what you're getting — no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Craftsmanship" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any aspect of our work, we'll return and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on standing behind every project for over 40 years — and that's a promise we never break.

faqs.question: What areas of the Hudson Valley do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, and Columbia Counties in New York, as well as Fairfield County in Connecticut. If you're in the Hudson Valley region, chances are we're already working near you.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book a landscape project?
faqs.answer: For major design-build projects, we recommend reaching out 4-6 weeks ahead of your desired start date. For tree services or excavation, we can often schedule within 1-2 weeks. Emergency tree removal is available with same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve homeowners, commercial property managers, HOAs, and government entities. Our team has the equipment and expertise for projects of any scale, from intimate garden designs to large-scale commercial grounds.

faqs.question: Are your arborists certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have ISA Certified Arborists and CTSP (Certified Treecare Safety Professionals) on staff. This means every tree service we perform meets the highest industry standards for safety and plant health.

faqs.question: Can I pick up materials from your supply yard?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our landscape supply yard is open to both contractors and homeowners. We offer mulch, topsoil, stone, plants, and trees for pickup or delivery throughout the Hudson Valley.

testimonials.name: HomeAdvisor Customer
testimonials.text: Red Cedar is very professional, very reliable and easy to work with. They re-graded our backyard, built stone walls and were able to solve some grading and slope challenges other landscape architects could not.

testimonials.name: Angi Verified Review
testimonials.text: I was extremely happy and impressed with the service, the workers, and the process. They were courteous, professional, creative, and met our needs at all times.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: Dependable, reliable, and efficient. The job was professionally and courteously handled within a week's time. They are appropriately priced for the quality of work delivered.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from the Hudson Valley's most experienced landscape team. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and provide an honest estimate.

footer.description: Family-owned landscape company. Serving the Hudson Valley since 1985.
footer.service_area: Serving Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, Columbia & Fairfield Counties
